blended.narrative: Rabbit Hill is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 232 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
